news.title: Fed Balance Sheet & Net Liquidity: TGA at $748B as of April 8, 2026
news.desc: As of April 8, 2026, the Federal Reserve balance sheet stands at $4,407B. The Treasury General Account (TGA) is at $748B, a key driver of net liquidity in the system. Reserve balances remain a closely watched indicator following the end of QT.

news.title: Fed Research: Setting a TGA Cap — A New Path for Balance Sheet Reduction
news.desc: A new Fed working paper explores capping the Treasury General Account to reduce the Fed's balance sheet while maintaining the Treasury's overall liquidity position. The proposal would roughly halve the TGA held at the Fed, keeping bank reserves stable.

news.title: 美联储缩表预期升温叠加2026年降息路径展望
news.desc: 部分美联储政策制定者提出新路径：通过降低银行对准备金的结构性需求，在不引发市场波动的前提下推进缩表。与此同时，市场对2026年降息路径的预期也在重新定价，流动性前景面临双重不确定性。
